mapper.select: SELECT session_id, summarized_until_seq_no, synopsis, structured_summary::text AS structured_summary, anchored_entities::text AS anchored_entities, segment_count, consecutive_failures, failed_start_seq_no, failed_end_seq_no, last_failure_class, next_retry_at, version, created_at, updated_at FROM chat_session_summary WHERE session_id = #{sessionId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_session_summary ( session_id, summarized_until_seq_no, synopsis, structured_summary, anchored_entities, segment_count, consecutive_failures, failed_start_seq_no, failed_end_seq_no, last_failure_class, next_retry_at, version, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{sessionId}, #{summarizedUntilSeqNo}, #{synopsis}, CAST(#{structuredSummaryJson} AS jsonb), CAST(#{anchoredEntitiesJson} AS jsonb), #{segmentCount}, #{consecutiveFailures}, #{failedStartSeqNo}, #{failedEndSeqNo}, #{lastFailureClass}, #{nextRetryAt}, #{version}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE chat_session_summary SET summarized_until_seq_no = #{summarizedUntilSeqNo}, synopsis = #{synopsis}, structured_summary = CAST(#{structuredSummaryJson} AS jsonb), anchored_entities = CAST(#{anchoredEntitiesJson} AS jsonb), segment_count = #{segmentCount}, consecutive_failures = #{consecutiveFailures}, failed_start_seq_no = #{failedStartSeqNo}, failed_end_seq_no = #{failedEndSeqNo}, last_failure_class = #{lastFailureClass}, next_retry_at = #{nextRetryAt}, version = version + 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} AND version = #{version}
